allow: Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\(''sharp''\); sharp\(Buffer.from\(''<svg xmlns=""http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"" width=""100"" height=""100""><rect width=""100"" height=""100"" fill=""red""/></svg>''\)\).png\(\).toBuffer\(\).then\(b => console.log\(''SVG works, size:'', b.length\)\).catch\(e => console.log\(''SVG error:'', e.message\)\)")
